ogTitle: Toorak vs Toorloo Arm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toorak and Toorloo Arm.
heading: Toorak vs Toorloo Arm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toorak, Victoria and Toorloo Arm, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toorak has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Toorloo Arm (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toorak or Toorloo Arm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toorak has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Toorloo Arm scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toorak scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Toorloo Arm scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toorak or Toorloo Arm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toorak has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
